arts.ttl: Mathys Tel wants Man Utd transfer after NIGHTMARE Spurs debut
arts.sum: Mathys Tel is reportedly eager to join Manchester United this summer, despite his Deadline Day loan move to Tottenham Hotspur. Following Spurs’ 4-0 defeat to Liverpool at Anfield, Ange Postecoglou was eager to praise both Kevin Danso and Tel for their debut performances, despite the result.

arts.ttl: Former Bayern Munich technical director rates Bayern’s winter window
arts.sum: There was only one permanent signing in the window in signing Jonas Urbig from FC Köln, though the Bavarians were able to confirm the signing of Tom Bischof from TSG Hoffenheim as well. The two loans of Mathys Tel and Adam Aznou ensure the boys have significantly more match practice than what would have been possible at Bayern.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich legend Uli Hoeneß grumbles over Thomas Tuchel’s repeated calls for expensive transfers
arts.sum: We wanted to try to work with more of our own players in the medium term,” Hoeneß explained, via @iMiaSanMia . Even before Tuchel left the club, legendary former Bayern president Uli Hoeneß saw fit to speak in public about his dissatisfaction with certain elements of Tuchel’s work and had continued to speak about it well after the former Mainz 05 manager’s departure from the club.

arts.ttl: Mathys Tel wants to join Manchester United in the summer transfer window
arts.sum: According to BILD journalist Christian Falk, Bayern Munich forward Mathys Tel (19) would like to join Manchester United in the summer transfer window. The Frenchman is currently on loan at Tottenham…

arts.ttl: Oliver Burke comes out of Celtic woodwork with red alert for Bayern Munich – 'this will be FAR from easy'
arts.sum: Burke reckons the German champions will be in for a scrap when they face his old team in the Champions League

arts.ttl: Celtic avoid ban on fans for game at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Celtic supporters avoid a ban for their Champions League play-off second leg at Bayern Munich, with the club fined for a smoke bomb at Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Arsenal SECRET, Chelsea GUARANTEE, Spurs’ Harry Kane MATCH POINT
arts.sum: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane has a release clause in his contract with the Bundesliga club that will become active next January. Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Arsenal SECRET, Chelsea GUARANTEE, Spurs’ Harry Kane MATCH POINT

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich's Adidas Kit Deal: Time for a Review?
arts.sum: In the ever-evolving landscape of football kit manufacturing deals, should Bayern Munich's long-standing partnership with Adidas come under scrutiny? Current Contract Position Bayern Munich's current supplier contract runs until 2030 and is valued at approximately €65 million annually.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Winger dreams of Bayern Munich move; West Ham to get Manchester United’s Rasmus Højlund?; Liverpool eyeing midfielders; Manchester United wants Viktor Gyökeres; Erling Haaland has escape clause in new Manchester City deal; and MORE!
arts.sum: Bayern Munich is a dream destination for many players — including Wolfsburg and Austria winger Patrick Wimmer. Bavarian Podcast Works — Preview Show: Bayern Munich vs.

arts.ttl: Werder Bremen looking to take advantage of Bayern Munich’s weakness against counterattacks
arts.sum: Werder Bremen midfielder Romano Schmid knows his squad is facing an uphill battle against Bayern Munich, but the 25-year-old Austrian believes the team will be ready to try and take down the Bundesliga powerhouse. One area where Schmid thinks Werder Bremen will be able to exploit the Bavarians is with quick counterattacks — a thorn in the side of Bayern Munich all season.
